answers: Loss is one of the hardest human experiences. Allow yourself to grieve — there is no correct way or timeline.
Coping: lean on loved ones, seek counseling, honor their memory, take care of basics (eat, sleep, move).
Tips: don't isolate yourself, express feelings (write, talk, create), and know that pain eventually becomes manageable.
Hariye fela koshto daayok — kintu tumi ekla na. Help nao, kotha bolo, ar nijer jotno nao.
